subcodes.first_line: These days are, by the testimony of God, without peer or likeness; all things are quickened by the Call of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایامی است بشهاده الله شبه و مثل نداشته و ندارد جمیع اشیاء از ندآء مالک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
